title: FPS+
description: A Collection of Minecraft Optimization Mods for 1.21.x. FPS+ can provide an FPS boost of up to 187%.
body:
# **Welcome to FPS+**
This is 'FPS+', a modpack I put together to make Minecraft as smooth as possible.

Please do NOT redistribute.

# **Vanilla VS FPS+**

Between Vanilla and FPS+, FPS+ has a higher increase in FPS than Vanilla by 187% on Maximum settings. 

It should be noted that the FPS shown in Gallery would often fluctuate on both versions, and the highest results could only be achieved by standing perfectly still.

I have an RTX 3050 Laptop 8GB RAM Intel Core 5

Essentially if your system is better than mine, your system should run this the same/better.

# **IMPORTANT:** 
A mod in this modpack known as Nvidium is INCOMPATIBLE with Shaders, but Shaders are still safe to use as Nvidium will simply disable itself. Shaders were not tested for this pack.

# **CREDIT:**

This modpack uses a fork of Nvidium for the latest version.

Fork:

https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium/releases

Original Mod & its GitHub Repository:

https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium
https://github.com/MCRcortex/nvidium
